_meta.ranking_basis: Hybrid: official competitive win rate is the backbone; a small set of manual overrides captures nuance that all-rank win rate misses.
_meta.stats_source: OverFast API /heroes/stats, official Blizzard competitive stats (PC, Americas)
_meta.tier_thresholds_note: Win-rate (%) lower bounds. A hero's tier is its win-rate bucket unless listed in overrides. Below the D threshold = E. Tune these to taste.
_meta.tier_weights_note: Used in the Team tab to weight a counter's averaged score by each enemy's tier, so countering a strong pick is rewarded over a weak one. 1.0 = no effect; set all to 1.0 to disable.
_meta.overrides_note: Manual tier adjustments layered on top of the win-rate backbone, for nuance all-rank win rate misses (high-elo/pro value, or low-rank inflation). Each says why. Cross-check against community_links (e.g. ML7) and edit freely. Delete an entry to fall back to the hero's win-rate tier.
_meta.disclaimer: Tier = the hero's official competitive win-rate bucket, unless overridden. Win rate is aggregated across all ranks, so it rewards easy-to-pilot heroes and understates high-skill-ceiling ones; that's what the overrides and the ML7 cross-link are for. Stats refresh via `npm run refresh-data -- --write`; thresholds and overrides are hand-tunable here.

summary: Season 3 is a barrier-heavy poke-vs-dive meta. By raw competitive win rate the ladder leaders are Shion and Reinhardt, with Zenyatta and Mizuki strong on the support line; Sojourn, D.Va and Orisa sit at the bottom. Note the high-elo/pro picture differs from all-rank win rate; see the overrides and ML7's tier list for that lens.

reinhardt.note: Manual: his ~54% all-rank win rate is inflated by lower ranks where he's hard to punish; high-elo value is lower.

sojourn.note: Manual: high-elo/pro staple; all-rank win rate badly understates her skill-ceiling value.

tracer.note: Manual: premier high-elo dive DPS; all-rank win rate understates pro priority.

ana.note: Manual: perennial pro-meta support; anti-nade + sleep keep her valuable despite a low all-rank win rate.

kiriko.note: Manual: pro/high-elo staple support; suzu utility outweighs her all-rank win rate.
